from alembic import op
import sqlalchemy as sa

    op.create_table(
        'user',
        sa.Column('id', sa.Integer(), nullable=False, autoincrement=True, primary_key=True),
        sa.Column('email', sa.Text(), nullable=False, unique=True),
        sa.Column('hashed_password', sa.Text(), nullable=False),
        sa.Column('full_name', sa.Text(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column('is_active', sa.Integer(), nullable=True, server_default='1'),
        sa.Column('created_at', sa.Text(), nullable=False, server_default=sa.text("(datetime('now'))")),
        sa.Column('deleted_at', sa.Text(), nullable=True)
    )
    
    op.create_table(
        'task',
        sa.Column('id', sa.Integer(), nullable=False, autoincrement=True, primary_key=True),
        sa.Column('title', sa.Text(), nullable=False),
        sa.Column('description', sa.Text(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column('status', sa.Text(), nullable=False),
        sa.Column('priority', sa.Text(), nullable=False),
        sa.Column('due_date', sa.Text(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column('created_at', sa.Text(), nullable=False, server_default=sa.text("(datetime('now'))")),
        sa.Column('updated_at', sa.Text(), nullable=False, server_default=sa.text("(datetime('now'))")),
        sa.Column('user_id', sa.Integer(), nullable=False),
        sa.Column('deleted_at', sa.Text(), nullable=True),
        sa.ForeignKeyConstraint(['user_id'], ['user.id'], ondelete='CASCADE'),
        sa.CheckConstraint("status IN ('todo', 'in_progress', 'done')", name='status_check'),
        sa.CheckConstraint("priority IN ('low', 'medium', 'high')", name='priority_check')
    )

def downgrade():
    op.drop_table('task')
    op.drop_table('user')
